title: Ore Bamboo Mod
description: This is a bamboo mod that can be crafted into minerals.
body:
## What is the Ore Bamboo Mod?

This is a type of bamboo that can be turned into ores.

You can plant it just like regular bamboo, and you'll have an endless supply of ores.

The drops from these bamboo can be replanted, **allowing you to easily create a large ore farm!!!**

## The Ore Bamboo Mod introduces eight different types of ore bamboo.
- ![coal_bamboo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b3c9ccec950af46cba151424c2117ea8714965b1_0.webp)Coal Bamboo
- ![copper_bamboo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a351077ad98fa01745b9a1d77fb2ac731cd64247.png)Copper Bamboo
- ![iron_bamboo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/edb5ee3b59c8c80e0e7fe262542c38a7f1d185fb_0.webp)Iron Bamboo
- ![gold_bamboo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9488e430c0e71bfe3ec1053d94346284bbd1f01e.png)Gold Bamboo
- ![diamond_bamboo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2d61b5532eef786e6f8402a05b5f809e88c0d1d.png)Diamond Bamboo
- ![emerald_bamboo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c2bbce91755ad1a00460200cf9fe49ae6e4bb4f4.png)Emerald Bamboo
- ![netherite_bamboo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f678e383b92b18a1115eefe4d884584f3f8b2162_0.webp)Netherite Bamboo
- ![lapislazuli_bmaboo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3babe6c473d2a339dc375062dd56a97cb0205bd4.png)Lapis Lazuli Bamboo

## Adds new bamboo crafting items, which are used to craft ore bamboo.
- ![baseorebamboo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/54af47ceccbf728f9607941418a6b8bb9b86482e.png)base ore bamboo
- ![polymerbamboo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/daf99d4d601cba06e401121abd5fca96cfe41b56.png)polymer bamboo
